message:
feat: add recorder backend bootstrap with FrankenSqlite fallback

Introduces a complete recorder backend startup system with safe
fallback behavior:

main.rs:
- RecorderBackendStartupSelection struct for backend selection state
- bootstrap_recorder_backend_with_probe() async function that attempts
  the configured backend (e.g. FrankenSqlite), performs a health probe,
  and falls back to AppendLog on failure
- Emits recorder.backend_selected lifecycle event to storage for
  observability
- RECORDER_BACKEND_MIGRATION_EPOCH constant for migration tracking
- "non-retryable:" marker support in watcher_error_is_non_retryable()
- 5 new tests: fallback behavior, health probes, lifecycle markers,
  config parsing

config.rs:
- recorder_backend field on StorageConfig (default: AppendLog)
- Hot-reload guard forbidding recorder_backend changes at runtime
- 3 new tests: hot-reload rejection, TOML parsing for "frankensqlite"
  and legacy "franken_sqlite" aliases, default validation

Cargo.toml (core):
- New "agent-mail" feature gate (implies subprocess-bridge)
- Remove duplicate tokio dev-dependency

Cargo.toml (binary):
- Forward tui-widgets and tui-dashboard feature gates to core

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
